zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de BOURBON於大約1320年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也姆林斯時，她的父親Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame42歲，母親Marie de Hainaut42歲。她於1334年12月與Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1383年12月25日在法國德 艾斯特姆斯達姆維勒斯享年64歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de BOURBON于大约1320年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也姆林斯时，她的父亲Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame42岁，母亲Marie de Hainaut42岁。她于1334年12月与Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1383年12月25日在法国德 艾斯特姆斯達姆維勒斯享年64岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURBON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de BOURBON was born about 1320, in Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, was 42 and her mother, Marie de Hainaut, was 42. She married Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême in December 1334, in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 25 December 1383, in Damvillers, Meuse, Grand Est, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de BOURBON est née environ 1320, à Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Marie de Hainaut, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême en décembre 1334, à Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1383, à Damvillers, Meuse, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de BOURBON um 1320 in Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame 42 und ihre Mutter Marie de Hainaut 42. Sie hat im Dezember 1334 in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1383 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Damvillers, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de BOURBON(이)가 대략 1320년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 모우린스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Hainaut(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1334년 12월 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 빈스네스에서 Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 12월 25일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 다비레르스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême em dezembro de 1334, em Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de BOURBON родилась около 1320 г. в местности моулинс, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Hainaut, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême декабрь 1334 г. в местности винценнесь, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 25 декабря 1383 г. в местности дамвиллирс, меус, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.
